- Both can fly ✓
- Both can sting/bite ✓
- Mosquito: known for spreading diseases like malaria, Zika, etc.; has a proboscis; typically considered a pest; active at dawn/dusk; doesn't produce honey; doesn't live in colonies/hives in the same way bees do
- Bee: known for pollination; produces honey; lives in hives/colonies; has a barbed stinger (some types); beneficial to ecosystem; can be domesticated; body structure different (hairy for pollen collection)

Good distinguishing questions:
- "Is it known for producing honey?" (Bee: yes, Mosquito: no)

- "Is it generally considered beneficial to agriculture?" (Bee: yes, Mosquito: no)
